subject: feat(builder): implement three-panel form builder with DnD, properties, and conditions
body:
Phase 2 implementation — the form builder UI:
- Field type registry: centralized config for all 13 types with defaults and palette display
- FieldPalette: draggable cards grouped by category (input/choice/layout), click-to-add
- BuilderCanvas: sortable field cards via dnd-kit, drag handles, selection, remove
- FieldPropertiesPanel: dynamic per-type property editing (label, placeholder, required,
  validation, options, layout, rating config, heading size, hidden defaults)
- OptionsEditor: add/remove/reorder options with auto-slug value generation
- ConditionBuilder: "Show when..." toggle with field/operator/value, AND/OR, show/hide
- PageTabs: add/remove/inline rename, field count badges, delete confirmation
- DndContext in BuilderPage: palette drops create fields, canvas drags reorder
- useAutoSave hook: 2s debounced save with status indicator (placeholder API)

Tags: builder, dnd-kit, forms, drag-and-drop, properties
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: added (auto-save uses placeholder API)
Epic: form-builder
Semver: minor
